SEARCH
Package org.web3j.protocol.core

Interface Ethereum

All Known Subinterfaces:
Admin, Web3j
All Known Implementing Classes:
JsonRpc2_0Admin, JsonRpc2_0Web3j
public interface Ethereum
Core Ethereum JSON-RPC API.
